block_reason: The candidate inventory and public-terms review do not select an operational source, product, delivery, or capability composition; all eight decision fields are absent and current account-specific rights remain unverified.

decision_fields.definition: Stable identifier for the independently approved capability-to-product composition.
Exact ordered delivery identifiers and variants.
Closed operational scope covered by the composition decision.
UTC time of the separately authorized composition decision.
Hash of future independent decision evidence, not supplied by Phase 21.

decision_gates.definition: All eight decision fields require a separately authorized accountable human decision.
Exactly one closed capability/source/product/delivery composition must be declared.
Every required Phase 16 capability must be explicitly assigned or rejected with approved rationale.
Current account-specific rights must cover every exact product, delivery, and intended use.
Independent immutable decision evidence must bind all fields without using a substitute identity.
All three post-selection dependencies must pass after composition and before any external action.

disclaimer: Portable decision-requirements evidence only. DECISION_REQUIREMENTS_FROZEN is not an operational selection, ranking, value, submission, rights grant, provider request, data capture, research result, execution authority, order, release, publication, or deployment.

forbidden_substitutes.definition: A Phase 17 artifact, policy, group, product, or manifest identity.
A Phase 18 artifact, policy, finding, currentness, or manifest identity.
A Phase 19 assessment identity or prerequisite binding.
A Phase 20 artifact, policy, input, evidence, gap, step, or manifest identity.
A candidate name, official fact, citation, or public URL.
Any score, rank, recommendation, heuristic, fallback, or default.
A placeholder, sentinel, all-zero, or arbitrary hash.
An override or unsupported self-attestation without independent evidence.
Any pull-request, tag, release, publication, deployment, workflow, or build identity.
Any credential, account identifier, provider request, response, payload, or side effect.

future_rules.definition: Phase 17 review naming cannot select a source, product, or delivery.
Phase 18 public-terms findings cannot prove current account-specific rights.
No partial decision-field set can create a composition.
Every required capability must be assigned within the same closed composition.
A future decision declares one composition and cannot be inferred from a ranking or score.
Future evidence must be independently produced and hash-bound to the complete decision.
Rights, schema, and point-in-time coverage checks cannot be pre-satisfied by candidates.
A completed composition alone grants no provider request, data, research, execution, or order authority.

inherited_phase20_input_requirements.definition: Require one independently approved operational capability-to-source/product composition before any policy or holdout can be complete.
Require current executed agreement and revocation evidence for the exact selected legal entity, products, delivery, and intended use.
Require exact selected delivery and schema versions plus temporal and instrument-identity field mappings.
Require pre-observation target history, calendar, availability, revision, validity, and missingness conventions.
Require a non-synthetic deterministic research-score, action/portfolio semantics, label, lag, and horizon specification.
Require exact feature lineage, lookbacks, availability, and train-only preprocessing rules.
Require data-specific nested chronological fold geometry and actual-label-interval purge rules.
Require an explicit geometry-dependent embargo applicability decision and duration only when applicable.
Require approved sample-adequacy thresholds and missing/no-trade return handling.
Require complete trial accounting and approved selection, DSR, PBO, frequency, and serial-correlation conventions.
Require approved L01-L06 and point-in-time data-quality blocking rules.
Require market-calibrated baseline fee, spread, impact, delay, borrow, participation, and capacity inputs with vintages.
Require predeclared all-cost and liquidity stress vectors plus promotion-blocking gates.
Require predeclared volatility, rate, crisis, and regime-dependency definitions.
Require approved computable position, exposure, turnover, volatility, loss, and drawdown limits.
Preserve the present immutable audit schema without treating it as policy or holdout evidence.
Require one selected-source/schema/calendar-bound contiguous unopened confirmation interval.
Require exact label-information boundaries and exclusion/purge rules around the confirmation interval.
Require label-blind exclusion, custodian, single-use consumption, and replacement/new-generation governance.
Require independent immutable approval records for the complete policy and unopened holdout definition.

post_selection_dependencies.definition: Require current account-specific executed rights and revocation status for the exact composition.
Require exact delivery and schema versions for every selected product.
Require point-in-time coverage, calendar, availability, revision, and missingness contracts.
